scripts.build: echo 'nothing to build for this package itself — the modules build via turbo ^build, from the workspace deps below'
scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-store... && ( set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose deploy module.ts ${STORE_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STORE_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose destroy module.ts --production ${STORE_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STORE_STACK_NAME"} )
